title: trigonella speciosa
intro: Trigonella speciosa, also known as the horse gram or khesari dal, is a perennial legume plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion due to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Trigonella speciosa include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and anxiety. Trigonella speciosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or extract, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to support overall health and well-being.
